task: Write a hero section for a project management SaaS. Include headline, subheadline, CTA button text, and 3 trust badges. Use AIDA framework. Output as HTML with Tailwind CSS.

Write a hero section for an AI writing assistant tool. Include headline, subheadline, two CTA buttons (primary + secondary), and a one-line social proof. Use AIDA framework. Output as HTML with Tailwind CSS.

Write a features section with 4 feature blocks for a cloud storage product. Each block has an icon placeholder (use a colored div), headline, and 2-sentence description. Use FAB framework. Output as HTML with Tailwind CSS.

Write a CTA section for a premium UX design course ($299). Include headline, 3 objection-busting bullet points, price display, and two buttons (Buy Now + Learn More). Use PAS framework. Output as HTML with Tailwind CSS.

Write a testimonial section with 3 customer quotes for a fitness app. Each testimonial has name, role, company, star rating (use text stars), and a 2-sentence quote. Write real, believable copy. Output as HTML with Tailwind CSS.

Write a pricing section with 3 tiers (Starter $9/mo, Pro $29/mo, Enterprise custom) for an email marketing platform. Each tier has name, price, 5 features, and a CTA button. Highlight Pro as recommended. Output as HTML with Tailwind CSS.

Write a footer section for a B2B analytics platform. Include 4 link columns (Product, Company, Resources, Legal), a newsletter signup with email input, social media links (text-only, no icons), and a copyright line. Output as HTML with Tailwind CSS.

Write a promotional banner for a Black Friday sale on a developer tools platform. Include headline with discount (40% off), urgency element (ends in 48h), one-line value prop, and a CTA button. Use PAS framework. Output as HTML with Tailwind CSS.

Write an FAQ section with 5 questions and answers for a SaaS billing tool. Questions should address common objections (security, pricing, migration, support, cancellation). Output as collapsible accordion HTML with Tailwind CSS.

Write a newsletter signup section for a tech blog. Include a compelling headline, one-sentence value prop, email input field, submit button, and a privacy note. Use AIDA framework. Output as HTML with Tailwind CSS.

Write a product comparison section showing your CRM vs 2 competitors. Use a 3-column table with 6 feature rows. Your product should have all checkmarks, competitors mixed. Include a headline and a CTA below the table. Output as HTML with Tailwind CSS.

Write a social proof / logos section for an API platform. Include a headline ('Trusted by 10,000+ developers'), a row of 6 company name badges (use styled text divs, no images), and a one-line stat ('99.9% uptime, 50ms avg response'). Output as HTML with Tailwind CSS.

Write a 404 error page for a productivity app. Include a friendly headline, a short humorous but professional message, a search bar, and two buttons ('Go Home' + 'Contact Support'). Keep it on-brand and helpful. Output as HTML with Tailwind CSS.

Write a hero section for a sustainable fashion brand's online store. Include headline, subheadline emphasizing eco-friendly values, CTA button, and a 'Free shipping over $50' badge. Use AIDA framework. Output as HTML with Tailwind CSS.

Write an About section for a fintech startup. Include company mission (one sentence), 3 value propositions with short descriptions, and a team stats bar (50+ employees, 3 offices, $10M raised). Output as HTML with Tailwind CSS.

Write an onboarding welcome section for a project management tool's dashboard. Include a welcome headline with user's name placeholder ({name}), 3 getting-started steps with descriptions, a progress indicator (Step 1 of 3), and a 'Skip Tutorial' link. Output as HTML with Tailwind CSS.

Write a hero section for a telemedicine platform. Include headline emphasizing convenience, subheadline about board-certified doctors, CTA button ('Book a Visit'), trust badges (HIPAA compliant, 24/7 available, 4.8 rating). Use AIDA framework. Output as HTML with Tailwind CSS.
